title: Replace 'connection initializing' message with account creation prompt

requirements.text: In HubView.tsx, replace the message 'Connection is still initializing. Please wait a moment and try again.' (shown when the user tries to post a task but is not yet authenticated or connected) with the message 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies.'

quotes: Instead of writing, connection is still initializing. Please wait a moment and try again. In this place, write. Make an account first to post the task in proxies.

acceptanceCriteria: The text 'Connection is still initializing. Please wait a moment and try again.' no longer appears anywhere in the UI when a user attempts to post a task without an account.
The text 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies.' is displayed in its place under the same triggering conditions.
All other behavior (guard logic, toast/modal display, navigation) remains unchanged.

constraints: Do not change any authentication or connection logic — only update the displayed message string.
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing the account creation flow itself.
Modifying backend connection or initialization logic.
Adding new UI elements beyond the updated message text.
